Examples.Title: Delete account
Examples.Description: Permanently delete the user account and all associated data (templates, API keys, logs). This action cannot be undone. Session auth only.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using PDF4Dev;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Create an API key
Examples.Description: Create a new API key. The full token is returned only once in the response: store it securely. Session auth only.
Examples.Code:
### Create an API key
# @name createApiKey
POST {{host}}/api/v1/api-keys
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "Production",
  "permission": "full_access"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Description: API key created. The `key` field contains the full token: this is the only time it is shown.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad request: missing or invalid parameters
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized: missing, invalid, or insufficient API key
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Delete an API key
Examples.Description: Permanently revoke an API key. Any requests using this key will immediately fail. Session auth only.
Examples.Code:
### Delete an API key
# @name deleteApiKey
DELETE {{host}}/api/v1/api-keys/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: API key deleted
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized: missing, invalid, or insufficient API key
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Resource not found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List API keys
Examples.Description: Returns all API keys for the authenticated user. Only key prefix is shown, not the full token. Session auth only.
Examples.Code:
using var client = new PDF4DevClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.ApiKeys.ListApiKeysAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using PDF4Dev;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Create a component
Examples.Description: Create a header or footer component. Use {{variables}} for data. In footers, use and for page numbers. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
### Create a component
# @name createComponent
POST {{host}}/api/v1/components
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string",
  "type": "header",
  "html": "string",
  "preview": "string"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Description: Component created
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad request: missing or invalid parameters
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized: missing, invalid, or insufficient API key
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Delete a component
Examples.Description: Permanently delete a component. Templates using it will no longer show it. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
### Delete a component
# @name deleteComponent
DELETE {{host}}/api/v1/components/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Component deleted
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized: missing, invalid, or insufficient API key
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Resource not found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get a component
Examples.Description: Retrieve a single component. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
### Get a component
# @name getComponent
GET {{host}}/api/v1/components/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Component found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized: missing, invalid, or insufficient API key
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Resource not found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List components
Examples.Description: Returns all components (headers, footers, blocks). Use header/footer IDs in templates for repeating page elements. Block components are referenced via <pdf4-block> tags in template HTML. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
using var client = new PDF4DevClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Components.ListComponentsAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using PDF4Dev;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Update a component
Examples.Description: Update a component's name or HTML. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
### Update a component
# @name updateComponent
PUT {{host}}/api/v1/components/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string",
  "type": "header",
  "html": "string",
  "preview": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Component updated
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized: missing, invalid, or insufficient API key
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Resource not found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List PDF generation logs
Examples.Description: Returns logs of all PDF generations with cursor-based pagination. Filter by status, template, or date range. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
using var client = new PDF4DevClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Logs.GetLogsAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using PDF4Dev;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Generate a PDF
Examples.Description: Render a PDF from a saved template or raw HTML. Pass `template_id` to use a saved template, or `html` for one-off renders. Variables in `{{handlebars}}` syntax are replaced with values from `data`. Returns the PDF as binary data (`application/pdf`).
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using PDF4Dev;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get usage statistics
Examples.Description: Returns aggregated usage statistics including template count, total renders, success rate, average duration, and total size. Optionally filter by time period. Session auth only.
Examples.Code:
using var client = new PDF4DevClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Stats.GetStatsAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using PDF4Dev;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Create a template
Examples.Description: Create a new template. The `name` is required and a URL-safe `slug` is auto-generated from it. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using PDF4Dev;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Delete a template
Examples.Description: Permanently delete a template. This action cannot be undone. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
### Delete a template
# @name deleteTemplate
DELETE {{host}}/api/v1/templates/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Template deleted
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized: missing, invalid, or insufficient API key
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Resource not found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Duplicate a template
Examples.Description: Creates a copy of the template with "(copy)" appended to its name. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
### Duplicate a template
# @name duplicateTemplate
POST {{host}}/api/v1/templates/{{id}}/duplicate
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 201
# Description: Template duplicated
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized: missing, invalid, or insufficient API key
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Resource not found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get a template
Examples.Description: Retrieve a single template by ID or slug. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
### Get a template
# @name getTemplate
GET {{host}}/api/v1/templates/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Template found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized: missing, invalid, or insufficient API key
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Resource not found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List templates
Examples.Description: Returns all templates belonging to the authenticated user. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
using var client = new PDF4DevClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Templates.ListTemplatesAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using PDF4Dev;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Update a template
Examples.Description: Update a template's HTML, format, or sample data. Only provided fields are updated. Requires `full_access` API key scope.
Examples.Code:
### Update a template
# @name updateTemplate
PUT {{host}}/api/v1/templates/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "html": "\u003Ch1\u003EUpdated Invoice #{{number}}\u003C/h1\u003E",
  "sample_data": {
    "number": "INV-002"
  }
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Template updated
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized: missing, invalid, or insufficient API key
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Resource not found
# Content-Type: application/json
